meta.name: 2 Baruch
meta.copyright: Public Domain translation by R.H. Charles

candidateSnapshot.chapter85FirstVerseAnchor: Know, therefore, that in former times and in the generations of old our fathers had helpers, righteous men and holy prophets.
candidateSnapshot.chapter86FirstVerseAnchor: Therefore, when you receive my letter, read it carefully in your assemblies. And meditate upon it, in particular however on the days of your fasts. And remember me by this letter, as I also, in the same way, remember you by it, and it may fare you well always.
candidateSnapshot.chapter87FirstVerseAnchor: And it happened, after I had finished all the words of this letter, composing it carefully until the end, that I folded it, and sealed it carefully, and bound it to the neck of the eagle. And I let it go and sent it away.

finding.summary: The identified Pseudepigrapha.com 2 Baruch witness aligns strongly through the visible main-text body, but the online page truncates after the beginning of Chapter 85 and does not provide the repo candidate's chapters 86-87. That mirror remains insufficient for complete row-level source-binding collation. A complete public-domain print witness has now been located as the Internet Archive scan/OCR of Charles APOT volume 2.

diagnosticBasis.observedAlignedRange: chapters 1-84 appear source-shape aligned by diagnostic chapter matching
diagnosticBasis.observedTailBlocker: source page begins Chapter 85 and then terminates; repo candidate contains chapters 85-87
sourceShapeNotes: online mirror includes interleaved Oxyrhynchus Greek fragment markers around chapters 12a, 13a, and 14a
online mirror tail is incomplete for candidate chapters 85-87
complete public-domain print source found in Internet Archive item apocryphapseudep02charuoft
source materialization and row-level collation are still required before app rendering or text trust

localImplications: Do not claim 2 Baruch source-binding collation from the incomplete mirror alone.
Do not mutate the candidate text from the incomplete online mirror.
Do not mark 2 Baruch app-render eligible until APOT volume 2 source materialization and row-level binding are complete.
Next work can now materialize the complete source from the located public-domain print witness.

nextAllowedWork: materialize the 2 Baruch section from Internet Archive APOT volume 2
compare candidate chapters 85-87 against the materialized complete witness
record a local source snapshot before any row-level collation
only then attempt 2 Baruch source binding
